title: Avoid terminal rename noise for cleaned native worker panes
goal: Remove expected cockpit_worker_rename_failed noise caused by native Pi TUI worker pane cleanup, without hiding real Herdr placement or rename failures.
acceptance: Native Pi TUI worker panes are no longer closed before terminal-summary outcome rename can run, or expected closed-pane renames are narrowly suppressed.
The fix must not turn all cockpit_worker_rename_failed cases into success; unexpected rename failures remain visible incidents.
Existing worker pane terminal rename dedupe behavior remains covered by tests.
